notes: Workbook is the human editing surface.
This JSON companion is the machine-readable indexing companion.
Section labels may evolve, but addresses should remain stable whenever possible.
This workbook companion is legacy scaffolding/reference and should not be treated as live shell payload truth.
Older labels such as KDB and positional level_3 conventions may still appear here as source-history, but newer runtime code should prefer file-owned tokens/views and shared LDB contracts.
